overall.description: Static elevated view of Times Square at sunset in a Spider-Man video game, featuring animated digital billboards, moving traffic, and the appearance of Spider-Man on a building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square commercial plaza with massive digital billboards

events.description: Spider-Man character appears crouched on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of the urban plaza and traffic below

notable_agents.action: Spider-Man crouches on the building edge, overlooking the street traffic

entered.detail: Large digital billboard displaying 'BUMPY SAINTS' advertisement with portrait
Digital billboard with 'COLEXCO' text on red background
Massive red billboard with 'INTENSE PERSONAL' text and figure
Tall building covered in multiple digital screens extending into the distance
Multi-lane street with moving traffic and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Static elevated view of a Times Square-inspired urban canyon at golden hour, surrounded by towering digital billboards on all sides. Traffic moves along the multi-lane street below while pedestrians walk the sidewalks. At approximately 8.5 seconds, Spider-Man appears crouched on the left building facade, overlooking the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a bustling urban canyon that shifts from a general city vista to a focused character reveal. It begins with a wide view of a Times Square-inspired intersection at golden hour, where towering digital billboards illuminate the surrounding architecture. As the camera lingers, the focus remains on the rhythmic flow of multi-lane traffic and pedestrians moving through the streets below. The scene then evolves as Spider-Man suddenly appears, crouched on a building facade to the left and overlooking the vibrant city landscape.
